Subject: Reminder that the DMNC testing for Summer 2001  is nearing an end -
Message:
RBoyle@nyiso.com writes to the NYISO_TECH_EXCHANGE Discussion List:

Section 4.2.1 of the ICAP manual states that the DMNC testing period for
the summer capability period will end on September 15.  If you have not
performed a DMNC test, time is running out.

Bob Boyle
